example.title: Customer-onboarding current-state excerpt
example.inputs: Onboarding handled by 2 teams; 3 systems involved; pain points from support tickets last 90 days.
example.output: { "processes": [{"id": "onb-1", "name": "Identity verification", "owner": "Maria Tkachuk", "depth": 2}], "systems": [{"id": "sys-kyc", "name": "KYC vendor X", "owner": "Andriy Hrytsenko"}], "pain_points": [{"id": "p1", "desc": "manual ID re-upload", "frequency": "weekly", "impact": "high", "score": 9}], "constraints": [{"id": "c1", "desc": "BSA/AML record retention 7y", "category": "regulatory"}], "owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "version": "1.1.0" }
example.commentary: Illustrates r1 (evidence), r2 (named owners), r3 (pain quantified), r4 (constraint categorised), r5 (depth=2).
